title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 307.080 - Auxiliary lamps — number — location — violation, penalty
text:
307.080.  Auxiliary lamps — number — location — violation, penalty. — 1.  Any motor vehicle may be equipped with not to exceed three auxiliary lamps mounted on the front at a height not less than twelve inches nor more than forty-two inches above the level surface upon which the vehicle stands.
  2.  Notwithstanding the provisions of section 307.120, violation of this section is an infraction.
(L. 1941 p. 438 § 8386g, A.L. 1996 H.B. 1047)
